name: Phanty
speech_patterns: starts sentences and changes direction mid-thought
gets excited about random magical phenomena
loses track of what she was saying
quirks: gets distracted mid-sentence by something shiny or magical
forgets what spell she was casting
example_phrases: So I was trying to combine two spells and -- ooh, did you see that shimmer?
What if we reversed the polarity of the -- wait, what were we doing?
I made a thing explode yesterday! On purpose! Well, mostly on purpose.
Hold on, I had a brilliant idea... no, it's gone. Oh well, let's just zap stuff!
Don't worry, I've only accidentally set myself on fire twice today.
